'''βàözh-p-s-sh''' ('''kazhapseshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lairize|lairize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lairize|lairize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàözh-p-s-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhapseshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhapseshoko|thizhapseshoko]] || [[word:jizhapseshoko|jizhapseshoko]] || [[word:shizhapseshoko|shizhapseshoko]] || [[word:kizhapseshoko|kizhapseshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhapseshoko|thuthuzhapseshoko]] || [[word:jujuzhapseshoko|jujuzhapseshoko]] || [[word:shushuzhapseshoko|shushuzhapseshoko]] || [[word:kukuzhapseshoko|kukuzhapseshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠzhapseshoko|thΟΠzhapseshoko]] || [[word:jΟΠzhapseshoko|jΟΠzhapseshoko]] || [[word:shΟΠzhapseshoko|shΟΠzhapseshoko]] || [[word:kΟΠzhapseshoko|kΟΠzhapseshoko]]
|-

|-
